generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components // Return code: 1 | Stderr:
instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor driving the first rotary joint of the MABI MAX 100 robot arm"
]

instance PlanetaryGearbox : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Planetary gearbox converting motor output to the joint shaft"
]

instance CycloidalGearbox : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox providing the final gear reduction for the joint"
]

instance MotorDriver : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor driver supplying torque to the permanent magnet synchronous motor"
]

// C3: Physical sensing components
instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "High‑precision current sensor measuring the stator current I_M of the motor"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CurrentStream
]

instance MotorPositionEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "High‑precision shaft encoder measuring the motor shaft angle θ_M"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorAngleStream
]

instance GearboxPositionEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "High‑precision shaft encoder measuring the gearbox output angle θ_G"
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxAngleStream
]

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction
instance CurrentStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
    base:desc "MQTT stream of motor current I_M transmitted in real‑time"
]

instance MotorAngleStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorPositionEncoder
    base:desc "MQTT stream of motor angle θ_M transmitted in real‑time"
]

instance GearboxAngleStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxPositionEncoder
    base:desc "MQTT stream of gearbox angle θ_G transmitted in real‑time"
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance SysMLEngineeringModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML component/connector diagram of Axis, Motor, and Gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkProcessingUnit
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTBroker
]

instance SimulinkFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model containing Coulomb‑Viscous, Stribeck, Dahl, and LuGre friction laws"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkProcessingUnit
]

instance CurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured motor current I_M captured from the sensor stream"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkProcessingUnit
]

instance MotorAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured motor angle θ_M captured from the sensor stream"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorAngleStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkProcessingUnit
]

instance GearboxAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured gearbox angle θ_G captured from the sensor stream"
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxAngleStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkProcessingUnit
]

instance ReferenceTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Reference torque r_M computed from current stream"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkProcessingUnit
]

instance AngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular velocity r_G derived from motor angle stream"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorAngleStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkProcessingUnit
]

instance AccelerationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular acceleration r_out derived from motor angle stream"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorAngleStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkProcessingUnit
]

instance SimulatedTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated torque r̂_M from the Simulink friction model"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkProcessingUnit
]

instance SimulatedVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated velocity r̂_G from the Simulink friction model"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorAngleStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkProcessingUnit
]

instance SimulatedAccelerationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated acceleration r̂_out from the Simulink friction model"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorAngleStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkProcessingUnit
]

// C11: Enablers
instance SimulinkProcessingUnit : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Simulink engine executing motor, gearbox and friction models to update virtual dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, ModelUpdateService, TraceAggregationService
]

instance MQTTBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker transmitting real‑time sensor streams and simulation traces"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataStreamingService
]

instance AssetAdministrationShell : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell exposing the first‑axis asset identity and metadata"
    DTDFVocab:enables TraceabilityService
]

instance DataAggregator : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Component aggregating data traces for visualization and analysis"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

// C6: Services
instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real‑time friction identification (white‑box and black‑box methods)"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionParameterInsight, UpdateFrictionTableAction
]

instance ModelUpdateService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous multi‑physics model update based on identified parameters"
    DTDFVocab:provides ParameterEvolutionInsight, UpdateControllerPIDAction
]

instance TraceAggregationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Aggregation of measured and simulated data traces for analysis"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataTraceInsight
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Web‑based dashboard rendering model‑based visualizations of joint kinematics"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight, UpdateDashboardAction
]

instance TraceabilityService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Traceability between data, models and source assets for auditability"
    DTDFVocab:provides TraceabilityInsight
]

instance DataStreamingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for streaming real‑time sensor data via MQTT"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataStreamingInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance FrictionParameterInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Identification of friction parameters and their evolution over time"
]

instance ParameterEvolutionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Tracking the evolution of friction parameters during operation"
]

instance DataTraceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Aggregation of measured and simulated data traces for troubleshooting"
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real‑time visualization of joint kinematics and friction behavior in the dashboard"
]

instance TraceabilityInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Traceability link between data traces, models, and the asset identity"
]

instance DataStreamingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight into real‑time data transmission quality and latency"
]

instance UpdateFrictionTableAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated insertion of updated friction table values into the controller"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance UpdateControllerPIDAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic adjustment of controller PID parameters based on refined friction models"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance UpdateDashboardAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Refresh dashboard visualizations with latest simulation and trace data"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

// C17: Environment
instance FirstAxisDigitalTwin : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor, PlanetaryGearbox, CycloidalGearbox, MotorDriver,
                MotorPositionEncoder, GearboxPositionEncoder, MotorCurrentSensor
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The digital shadow is passive and does not generate control commands or outputs to the robot; it only visualises and identifies friction but does not influence the PT"
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Continuous real‑time synchronization with the robot’s sampling rate (milliseconds to seconds – real‑time)"
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestrated system consisting of the physical asset (first axis), data sources (encoders, current sensor), a processing component that runs simulation models, and a visualization dashboard; all tied together by the AAS and MQTT connectivity"
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT covers the operated phase, integrating design‑phase simulation models and operational live data for continuous model refinement"
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "White‑box analytical friction models calibrated with live data; black‑box data models; validation performed by comparing simulated outputs against measured data traces; continuous identification mitigates parameter drift due to wear, load changes, temperature, with traceability through processing component"
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT over IP network connecting the physical robot controller to the DT location; data streams include current and encoder signals; AAS defines connectivity"
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Use of Asset Administration Shells (AAS) per IEC 62264/ISO 10303, SysML v1.7, and adherence to MBSE principles for engineering and simulation"
]
